query_title: Leatherface: The Texas Chainsaw Massacre III

recommendations.title: Pumpkinhead II: Blood Wings
recommendations.overview: Thrill-seeking teenagers resurrect a demon from his grave and a bloody rampage for revenge begins.

recommendations.title: Puppet Master 4
recommendations.overview: Blade, Tunneler, and Pinhead go toe-to-toe with a team of terrifying, gremlin-like creatures known as "Totems" that are sent by the Egyptian demon Sutekh to recapture the magic stolen by Toulon.

recommendations.title: Puppet Master V: Totem
recommendations.overview: Sutekh, the dark pharaoh from another dimension, sends his own puppet, Totem, to continue his quest to kill Rick and steal the magic which animates the puppets.

recommendations.title: Stepfather 2
recommendations.overview: "Stepfather" Jerry Blake escapes an insane asylum and winds up in another town, this time impersonating a marriage counselor. With a future wife and new stepson who love him, Blake eliminates anyone who stands in his way to building the perfect famil

recommendations.title: Wind Chill
recommendations.overview: Two college students share a ride home for the holidays. When they break down on a deserted stretch of road, they're preyed upon by the ghosts of people who have died there.

recommendations.title: Marriage Story
recommendations.overview: A stage director and an actress struggle through a grueling, coast-to-coast divorce that pushes them to their personal extremes.

recommendations.title: Dog
recommendations.overview: An army ranger and his dog embark on a road trip along the Pacific Coast Highway to attend a friend's funeral.

recommendations.title: The Hitcher II: I've Been Waiting
recommendations.overview: A sadistic serial killer terrorizes a couple driving on a rural highway in Texas while killing numerous people and framing them for his killings.

recommendations.title: Deep
recommendations.overview: Four insomniac med school students are lured into a neuroscience experiment that spirals out of control and must find a way out before it’s too late.
recommendations.director: Thanabodee Uawithya, Jetarin Ratanaserikiat, Apirak Samudkitpaisan, Sita Likitvanichkul, Adirek Watleela

recommendations.title: Children of the Corn V: Fields of Terror
recommendations.overview: Six college students take a wrong turn and find themselves lost in a strangely deserted rural town... only to discover that this deceptively quiet place hides a murderous cult of children.
